card.name: Comeuppance
card.property: Prevent all damage that would be dealt to you and planeswalkers you control this turn by sources you don't control. If damage from a creature source is prevented this way, Comeuppance deals that much damage to that creature. If damage from a noncreature source is prevented this way, Comeuppance deals that much damage to the source's controller.

card.name: Leyline Binding
card.property: Flash Domain — This spell costs {1} less to cast for each basic land type among lands you control. When this enchantment enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Nine Lives
card.property: Hexproof If a source would deal damage to you, prevent that damage and put an incarnation counter on this enchantment. When there are nine or more incarnation counters on this enchantment, exile it. When this enchantment leaves the battlefield, you lose the game.

card.name: Path to Exile
card.property: Exile target creature. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Reprieve
card.property: Return target spell to its owner's hand. Draw a card.

card.name: Rest in Peace
card.property: When this enchantment enters, exile all graveyards. If a card or token would be put into a graveyard from anywhere, exile it instead.

card.name: Wedding Ring
card.property: When this artifact enters, if it was cast, target opponent creates a token that's a copy of it. Whenever an opponent who controls an artifact named Wedding Ring draws a card during their turn, you draw a card. Whenever an opponent who controls an artifact named Wedding Ring gains life during their turn, you gain that much life.

card.name: Clever Impersonator
card.property: You may have this creature enter as a copy of any nonland permanent on the battlefield.

card.name: Counterspell
card.property: Counter target spell.

card.name: Lorthos, the Tidemaker
card.property: Whenever Lorthos attacks, you may pay {8}. If you do, tap up to eight target permanents. Those permanents don't untap during their controllers' next untap steps.

card.name: Mindbreak Trap
card.property: If an opponent cast three or more spells this turn, you may pay {0} rather than pay this spell's mana cost. Exile any number of target spells.

card.name: Mystic Confluence
card.property: Choose three. You may choose the same mode more than once. • Counter target spell unless its controller pays {3}. • Return target creature to its owner's hand. • Draw a card.

card.name: Ponder
card.property: Look at the top three cards of your library, then put them back in any order. You may shuffle. Draw a card.

card.name: Rite of Replication
card.property: Kicker {5} (You may pay an additional {5} as you cast this spell.) Create a token that's a copy of target creature. If this spell was kicked, create five of those tokens instead.

card.name: Traumatize
card.property: Target player mills half their library, rounded down.

card.name: Feed the Swarm
card.property: Destroy target creature or enchantment an opponent controls. You lose life equal to that permanent's mana value.

card.name: Hex
card.property: Destroy six target creatures.

card.name: Infernal Grasp
card.property: Destroy target creature. You lose 2 life.

card.name: Opposition Agent
card.property: Flash You control your opponents while they're searching their libraries. While an opponent is searching their library, they exile each card they find. You may play those cards for as long as they remain exiled, and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any color to cast them.

card.name: Reanimate
card.property: Put target creature card from a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control. You lose life equal to that card's mana value.

card.name: Saw in Half
card.property: Destroy target creature. If that creature dies this way, its controller creates two tokens that are copies of that creature, except their power is half that creature's power and their toughness is half that creature's toughness. Round up each time.

property.name: Artist
property.value: John Romita Jr. & John Romita Sr.

card.name: Skithiryx, the Blight Dragon
card.property: Flying Infect (This creature deals damage to creatures in the form of -1/-1 counters and to players in the form of poison counters.) {B}: Skithiryx gains haste until end of turn. {B}{B}: Regenerate Skithiryx.

card.name: Goblin Bombardment
card.property: Sacrifice a creature: This enchantment deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Najeela, the Blade-Blossom
card.property: Whenever a Warrior attacks, you may have its controller create a 1/1 white Warrior creature token that's tapped and attacking. {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}: Untap all attacking creatures. They gain trample, lifelink, and haste until end of turn. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase. Activate only during combat.

card.name: Relentless Assault
card.property: Untap all creatures that attacked this turn. After this main phase, there is an additional combat phase followed by an additional main phase.

card.name: Savage Beating
card.property: Cast this spell only during combat on your turn. Choose one — • Creatures you control gain double strike until end of turn. • Untap all creatures you control. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase. Entwine {1}{R} (Choose both if you pay the entwine cost.)

card.name: Shock
card.property: Shock deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Thrill of Possibility
card.property: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Draw two cards.

card.name: Unexpected Windfall
card.property: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Draw two cards and create two Treasure tokens. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Winds of Change
card.property: Each player shuffles the cards from their hand into their library, then draws that many cards.

card.name: Arachnogenesis
card.property: Create X 1/2 green Spider creature tokens with reach, where X is the number of creatures attacking you. Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt this turn by non-Spider creatures.

card.name: Arasta of the Endless Web
card.property: Reach Whenever an opponent casts an instant or sorcery spell, create a 1/2 green Spider creature token with reach.

card.name: Beast Within
card.property: Destroy target permanent. Its controller creates a 3/3 green Beast creature token.

card.name: Heroic Intervention
card.property: Permanents you control gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Hunter's Insight
card.property: Choose target creature you control. Whenever that creature deals combat damage to a player or planeswalker this turn, draw that many cards.

card.name: Parallel Lives
card.property: If an effect would create one or more tokens under your control, it creates twice that many of those tokens instead.

card.name: Silkguard
card.property: Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to X target creatures you control. Auras, Equipment, and modified creatures you control gain hexproof until end of turn. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)

card.name: Tangle
card.property: Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt this turn. Each attacking creature doesn't untap during its controller's next untap step.

card.name: Alibou, Ancient Witness
card.property: Other artifact creatures you control have haste. Whenever one or more artifact creatures you control attack, Alibou deals X damage to any target and you scry X, where X is the number of tapped artifacts you control.

card.name: Terminate
card.property: Destroy target creature. It can't be regenerated.

card.name: Archangel of Thune
card.property: Flying Lifelink (Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.) Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Concerted Effort
card.property: At the beginning of each upkeep, creatures you control gain flying until end of turn if a creature you control has flying. The same is true for fear, first strike, double strike, landwalk, protection, trample, and vigilance.

card.name: Don't Move
card.property: Destroy all tapped creatures. Until your next turn, whenever a creature becomes tapped, destroy it.

card.name: Ephemerate
card.property: Exile target creature you control, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control. Rebound (If you cast this spell from your hand, exile it as it resolves. At the beginning of your next upkeep, you may cast this card from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Final Showdown
card.property: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) + {1} — All creatures lose all abilities until end of turn. + {1} — Choose a creature you control. It gains indestructible until end of turn. + {3}{W}{W} — Destroy all creatures.

card.name: Light of Promise
card.property: Enchant creature Enchanted creature has "Whenever you gain life, put that many +1/+1 counters on this creature."

card.name: Path to Exile
card.property: Exile target creature. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Return to the Ranks
card.property: Convoke (Your creatures can help cast this spell. Each creature you tap while casting this spell pays for {1} or one mana of that creature's color.) Return X target creature cards with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Righteous Fury
card.property: Destroy all tapped creatures. You gain 2 life for each creature destroyed this way.

card.name: Steelshaper's Gift
card.property: Search your library for an Equipment card, reveal that card, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Teferi's Protection
card.property: Until your next turn, your life total can't change and you gain protection from everything. All permanents you control phase out. (While they're phased out, they're treated as though they don't exist. They phase in before you untap during your untap step.) Exile Teferi's Protection.

card.name: Counterspell
card.property: Counter target spell.

card.name: Cyberdrive Awakener
card.property: Flying Other artifact creatures you control have flying. When this creature enters, each noncreature artifact you control becomes a 4/4 artifact creature until end of turn.

card.name: Dig Through Time
card.property: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) Look at the top seven cards of your library. Put two of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

card.name: Harbinger of the Seas
card.property: Nonbasic lands are Islands.

card.name: Lord of Atlantis
card.property: Other Merfolk get +1/+1 and have islandwalk. (They can't be blocked as long as defending player controls an Island.)

card.name: Mechanized Production
card.property: Enchant artifact you control At the beginning of your upkeep, create a token that's a copy of enchanted artifact. Then if you control eight or more artifacts with the same name as one another, you win the game.

card.name: Narset's Reversal
card.property: Copy target instant or sorcery spell, then return it to its owner's hand. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Reconnaissance Mission
card.property: Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, you may draw a card. Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Show and Tell
card.property: Each player may put an artifact, creature, enchantment, or land card from their hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Simulacrum Synthesizer
card.property: When this artifact enters, scry 2. Whenever another artifact you control with mana value 3 or greater enters, create a 0/0 colorless Construct artifact creature token with "This token gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control."

card.name: Three Steps Ahead
card.property: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) + {1}{U} — Counter target spell. + {3} — Create a token that's a copy of target artifact or creature you control. + {2} — Draw two cards, then discard a card.

card.name: Dauthi Voidwalker
card.property: Shadow (This creature can block or be blocked by only creatures with shadow.) If a card would be put into an opponent's graveyard from anywhere, instead exile it with a void counter on it. {T}, Sacrifice this creature: Choose an exiled card an opponent owns with a void counter on it. You may play it this turn without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Deadly Dispute
card.property: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice an artifact or creature. Draw two cards and create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Extinction Event
card.property: Choose odd or even. Exile each creature with mana value of the chosen quality. (Zero is even.)

card.name: Final Act
card.property: Choose one or more — • Destroy all creatures. • Destroy all planeswalkers. • Destroy all battles. • Exile all graveyards. • Each opponent loses all counters.

card.name: Massacre Girl
card.property: Menace When Massacre Girl enters, each other creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn. Whenever a creature dies this turn, each creature other than Massacre Girl gets -1/-1 until end of turn.

card.name: No Mercy
card.property: Whenever a creature deals damage to you, destroy it.

card.name: Chaos Warp
card.property: The owner of target permanent shuffles it into their library, then reveals the top card of their library. If it's a permanent card, they put it onto the battlefield.

card.name: Fiery Emancipation
card.property: If a source you control would deal damage to a permanent or player, it deals triple that damage to that permanent or player instead.

card.name: Fury of the Horde
card.property: You may exile two red cards from your hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost. Untap all creatures that attacked this turn. After this main phase, there is an additional combat phase followed by an additional main phase.

card.name: Monstrous Rage
card.property: Target creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn. Create a Monster Role token attached to it. (If you control another Role on it, put that one into the graveyard. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has trample.)

card.name: Seize the Day
card.property: Untap target creature. After this main phase, there is an additional combat phase followed by an additional main phase. Flashback {2}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Bedlam
card.property: Creatures can't block.

card.name: Beast Within
card.property: Destroy target permanent. Its controller creates a 3/3 green Beast creature token.

card.name: Defense of the Heart
card.property: At the beginning of your upkeep, if an opponent controls three or more creatures, sacrifice this enchantment, search your library for up to two creature cards, put those cards onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Force of Vigor
card.property: If it's not your turn, you may exile a green card from your hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost. Destroy up to two target artifacts and/or enchantments.

card.name: Heroic Intervention
card.property: Permanents you control gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Heroic Intervention
card.property: Permanents you control gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Heroic Intervention
card.property: Permanents you control gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Primal Vigor
card.property: If one or more tokens would be created, twice that many of those tokens are created instead. If one or more +1/+1 counters would be put on a creature, twice that many +1/+1 counters are put on that creature instead.

card.name: Rancor
card.property: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+0 and has trample. When this Aura is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, return it to its owner's hand.

card.name: Steely Resolve
card.property: As this enchantment enters, choose a creature type. Creatures of the chosen type have shroud. (They can't be the targets of spells or abilities.)

card.name: Unnatural Growth
card.property: At the beginning of each combat, double the power and toughness of each creature you control until end of turn.

card.name: Anthem of Champions
card.property: Creatures you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Aurelia, the Warleader
card.property: Flying, vigilance, haste Whenever Aurelia attacks for the first time each turn, untap all creatures you control. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

card.name: Black Panther, Wakandan King
card.property: First strike Survey the Realm — Whenever Black Panther or another creature you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target land you control. Mine Vibranium — {3}: Move all +1/+1 counters from target land you control onto target creature. If one or more +1/+1 counters are moved this way, you gain that much life and draw a card.

card.name: Captain America, First Avenger
card.property: Throw ... — {3}, Unattach an Equipment from Captain America: He deals damage equal to that Equipment's mana value divided as you choose among one, two, or three targets. ... Catch — At the beginning of combat on your turn, attach up to one target Equipment you control to Captain America.

card.name: Escape to the Wilds
card.property: Exile the top five cards of your library. You may play cards exiled this way until the end of your next turn. You may play an additional land this turn.

card.name: Fight to the Death
card.property: Destroy all blocking creatures and all blocked creatures.

card.name: Iron Man, Titan of Innovation
card.property: Flying, haste Genius Industrialist — Whenever Iron Man attacks, create a Treasure token, then you may sacrifice a noncreature artifact. If you do, search your library for an artifact card with mana value equal to 1 plus the sacrificed artifact's mana value, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Privileged Position
card.property: ({G/W} can be paid with either {G} or {W}.) Other permanents you control have hexproof. (They can't be the targets of spells or abilities your opponents control.)

card.name: Ravenous Tyrannosaurus
card.property: Devour 3 (As this creature enters, you may sacrifice any number of creatures. It enters with three times that many +1/+1 counters on it.) Whenever this creature attacks, it deals damage equal to its power to up to one other target creature. Excess damage is dealt to that creature's controller instead.

card.name: Storm, Force of Nature
card.property: Flying, vigilance Ceaseless Tempest — Whenever Storm deals combat damage to a player, the next instant or sorcery spell you cast this turn has storm. (When you cast it, copy it for each spell cast before it this turn. You may choose new targets for the copies.)

card.name: Sundering Growth
card.property: Destroy target artifact or enchantment, then populate. (Create a token that's a copy of a creature token you control.)

card.name: Warleader's Call
card.property: Creatures you control get +1/+1. Whenever a creature you control enters, this enchantment deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Wolverine, Best There Is
card.property: Unrivaled Lethality — Double all damage Wolverine would deal. At the beginning of each end step, if Wolverine dealt damage to another creature this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on him. {1}{G}: Regenerate Wolverine. (The next time he would be destroyed this turn, instead tap him, remove him from combat, and heal all damage on him.)

card.name: Horn of Greed
card.property: Whenever a player plays a land, that player draws a card.

card.name: Roaming Throne
card.property: Ward {2} As this creature enters, choose a creature type. This creature is the chosen type in addition to its other types. If a triggered ability of another creature you control of the chosen type triggers, it triggers an additional time.

card.name: Sword of Fire and Ice
